title: cystopteris fragilis f. dickeana
intro: Cystopteris fragilis f. dickeana, also known as the Dicke's Cystopteris, is a rare and endangered species of fern found in North America. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to lower blood pressure and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Cystopteris fragilis f. dickeana include its potential to treat conditions such as high blood pressure, bronchitis, and skin irritations, as well as its ability to act as a diuretic. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and used in teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects on human health.
